appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Layout Conventions' section documenting pb-20 bottom padding requirement for all user-facing pages with bottom tab bar, and LayoutWrapper conditional behavior.
Added 'Auth Patterns' section documenting missing SessionProvider (not needed yet but required for future useSession() usage) and hand-written API validation pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'API input validation should use a schema validation library (e.g., zod) for consistent, robust validation across all routes.' Currently register route uses manual checks with weak email/phone format validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature auth-system: app/api/auth/register/route.ts uses emailOrPhone.includes('@') for email validation and permissive phone regex. Multiple reviewers flagged this as a non-blocking concern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'All user-facing pages that display within the bottom tab layout must include pb-20 (padding-bottom: 5rem) to prevent content overlap with the fixed bottom tab navigation bar.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature bottom-tab-layout: all 5 page files use className='min-h-screen p-4 pb-20'. This pattern is critical but undocumented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The fullstack-worker skill should clarify that TDD (step 4) and agent-browser verification (step 8) may be skipped for scaffolding and schema-only features that have no testable API/UI behavior. Currently workers mark followedProcedure: true despite skipping these steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features project-scaffolding and database-schema-and-seed both skipped TDD and browser verification. Workers justified the skips but the skill doesn't explicitly allow them for non-behavioral features.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dev script in package.json doesn't hardcode port 3100, relies on PORT env var from services.yaml.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already handled by services.yaml. The PORT=3100 prefix in services.yaml is the canonical way to set the port. Not a gap worth documenting.

rejectedObservations.observation: Manual viewport meta tag instead of Next.js 14+ viewport metadata API export.
rejectedObservations.reason: Works correctly as-is. Minor code style preference, not worth applying or recommending.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md seed data example product names (Messi #10, FC Barcelona) don't match actual seed data (national team jerseys).
rejectedObservations.reason: Trivial cosmetic discrepancy. The seed data meets all quantitative requirements (6+ products, realistic names, $99-$299 range). Not worth updating AGENTS.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker modified home page content from scaffolding text to placeholder during bottom-tab-layout feature.
rejectedObservations.reason: Expected behavior — placeholder content will be replaced by the goods-home-page feature in the next milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: Package.json dependencies were re-sorted alphabetically during bottom-tab-layout commit.
rejectedObservations.reason: Trivial formatting change, not actionable or worth documenting.
